overview.summary: Model score 6 vs user score 5 (gap 1). Primary drivers: Motion / Restlessness, Session Duration. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Short observation window likely caused the model to smooth over transient distractions that the user perceived strongly.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio captured environmental pattern; next run should penalize repeated speech bursts more aggressively for reading tasks.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals were partially informative; next run should treat missing HR windows as uncertainty rather than neutral evidence.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion settling was detected correctly; avoid over-crediting stillness when other distraction signals are strong.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS is useful for confirming location stability; keep it as secondary context signal.

judgment_policy_next_run: Reduce compensatory credit from stationary motion when primary factors are adverse.
Use uncertainty-aware scoring for short sessions with incomplete multimodal coverage.
